name: 05-09-home-light-nav-real-controls
title: Home light nav real controls
description: Move the light homepage navigation click targets from the full-page overlay into LightReferenceNav as real Link/button controls while preserving 1:1 visual backing.
scope: homepage light navigation real link/button control extraction
creator: lijin
notes: Navigation controls now render inside LightReferenceNav as data-home-light-nav-controls=real-links Link/button elements. The full-page body hotspot overlay no longer duplicates nav controls. Static route tests, typecheck, and build passed. Playwright intentionally skipped because user confirmed manual visual inspection is available.

meta.coordinate_conversion: full-artboard hotspot top/height percentages converted to local nav-section percentages
meta.visual_qa: manual inspection available; Playwright self-check skipped by user preference
